subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Thou by Whose name the gate of knowledge was opened before all creation,and at Whose behest
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک یا من باسمک فتح باب العرفان علی من فی الامکان و بارادتک نزلت آیات
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for service
